raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Arrig weena Jumprawa
aismirst tawu Glihtumu / jeb
weena Bruhte tawu Gresinumu?
Bet manni Landis irr mannis
aismirfuschi bes Galla.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kapehz tu tawu Darbu
tā skaidro/ Mihlestitbu mekleda-
ma? Kur tu tomehr tahs Blehd-
nezes pačhas tavus Zeltus
mahzi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wehl arridsan tohp tas
Akins to behdign nenoseedsigu
Dwehselu eekch tawahn Wih-
lehm atrastā/ ne dauds jarohk to
atrast/ bet tas irr pee wiffahm
tahm (Wihlehem.)
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tatschu tu fakki: Es ef-
mu nenoseedsiga/ tapehz lai Win-
na Bahrsiba no mannis nogree-
schahs/ rangi/ es gribbu ar tew
teefaht par to/ ka tu fakki: Es ne
efunu grehkojfi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ko tu wasajees dauds ta-
wu Zeltu pahrgrohsidaina? Ir
no Egiptes tapft tu tapatt ap-
fineeta/ ka tu no Assura efi ap-
fineeta tappuft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo no tennenes buhs teiw
arridsan ja-aiseet/ un tu fasitti-
fi tawas Rohkas pahr tawu Gal-
wu. Jo tas KUNGS irr wisfu
tawu Pakautschannu atmettis/ ka
tew pee winneem neka labbi is-
dohsees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un fakka: Kad kahds Wihre
fawu Seewu atstahdina/ un ta
eet no winna nobst / un nemm
zittu Wihru / arrig tas drihkst
winnu atkat peeneint? Neggi ta
Semme (zaur to) taptu tohti
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "fagabnita? Bet tu efi ar daud
Drauguteim Mauzibu dsinnuti
Tomehr atgreesees atkat pee man-
nim/ tafka tas KINGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pazell tawas Azizis ue-
teem Augstumeim / un raugi/
kur tu ne efi apfmeeta tappusi
Tu efi winnu deht Zelt-Malla
sehdejfi ka weens Araberis Tuk-
nefi/ ta efi tu to Semmi fagah-
nifi ar tawas Mauzibas un ar
tawas Blehdibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz tohp tas agraje
Leetus aisturrehts / un wehlaje
Leetus ne nahk. Bet tew ir-
weena Maukas Peere/ tu ne grib-
bi faunetees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tatschu tu no ta Laik-
manni peesauz: Mans Tehws/
tu efi tas Waddons manna-
Jaunibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Arrig winsch muhschan-
dusmoses? Woj winsch lihd
Gallam (to Bahrsibu) patur-
rehs? Rangi/ tu runna un dar-
ri Blehnas zik spehdama.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
Weena Guhdsechana pahr Juhdu/kas gaur I
fraeta Godhibahm ne irr rahmakā/ bet nik-
naks tappis: 1/6. Tapehz buhs tam no Gre-
keem atgreesees: 12. Ka tas atkat Kuhs-
usjemts: 14. Ka arri weena Papreeksch-
fluddinaechana ns Kristos Walstibas/ un na
Mitteschanas to Lewitu Uppurecm: 16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ehl kazztja tas KUNg-
uhs manni/ eekch tahm
Deenahm ta Rehniz-
Josijus: Efi tu redsejs / ko ta-
atkahpajs Israēls irr darrijs-
Winsch gabje us ifkatru augsti
Kalnu / un appaksh wiheen-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
